# ABB

**Category:** Power and Electrical Infrastructure
**Website:** https://global.abb/

## Headline
Global electrical systems partner useful for power distribution, integration, and utility-facing infrastructure decisions.

## Overview
ABB is most relevant in the marketplace when buyers are evaluating power and electrical readiness before AI infrastructure buildout. In modular and high-density contexts, electrical design quality and uptime strategy can materially reduce deployment risk.

## Key capabilities
- medium-voltage and electrical systems expertise
- power infrastructure integration for AI deployments
- resilient design patterns for high-demand workloads

## Best fit for
- projects with strong emphasis on electrical planning
- buyers comparing infrastructure stack options
- teams evaluating reliability and safety in dense compute environments

## Considerations
When modular projects are at an early stage, prioritize concrete power design references before committing to broader supplier selections.
